Details: Removal of mevinphos by reverse osmosis (RO) was effective in four EPA Environmental Technology Verification studiestwo studies (equal to or greater than 96 percent removal) [617, 618, 1487, 1488]. The membrane units tested were components of two point-of-use drinking water treatment systems. The RO membrane of each system was tested alone for mevinphos removal. For these studies, pH ranged 7.0 to 8.0.
